[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001111 5
1 11011010 5
2 11001111 6
3 11001011 5
4 11010111 6
5 11111100 6
6 01110111 6
7 10111101 6

01 10 00000010 1
12 21 01111100 5
23 32 11001100 4
34 43 11101001 5
45 54 11011001 5
56 65 01101111 6
67 76 10000111 4
70 07 01101010 4

02 20 01111110 6
13 31 10110000 3
24 42 00100101 3
35 53 00110000 2
46 64 10110110 5
57 75 11101000 4
60 06 11101101 6
71 17 01101000 3

03 30 10110010 4
14 41 01011001 4
25 52 11111100 6 match 5
36 63 01011111 6
47 74 00110001 3
50 05 10000010 2
61 16 11101111 7
72 27 00010100 2

04 40 01011011 5
15 51 10000000 1
26 62 10010011 4
37 73 11011000 4
